creator: info@pixinsight.com
text:
PixInsight is an advanced, modular image processing software platform designed specifically for the demanding requirements of astrophotography and other technical imaging fields. PixInsight is available natively on FreeBSD, Linux, Mac OS X and Windows operating systems, in 32-bit and 64-bit versions.

Website: http://www.pixinsight.com/

Categories (suggested): Image Processing, Scientific/Research, Astronomy
